Package org.areslib.hardware.coprocessors.photon

Class PhotonLynxModule

java.lang.Object
com.qualcomm.hardware.lynx.LynxCommExceptionHandler
com.qualcomm.hardware.lynx.LynxModule
org.areslib.hardware.coprocessors.photon.PhotonLynxModule
All Implemented Interfaces:
com.qualcomm.hardware.lynx.LynxModuleIntf, com.qualcomm.robotcore.hardware.Blinker, com.qualcomm.robotcore.hardware.Engagable, com.qualcomm.robotcore.hardware.HardwareDevice, com.qualcomm.robotcore.hardware.RobotCoreLynxModule, com.qualcomm.robotcore.hardware.usb.RobotArmingStateNotifier, com.qualcomm.robotcore.hardware.usb.RobotArmingStateNotifier.Callback, com.qualcomm.robotcore.hardware.VisuallyIdentifiableHardwareDevice
public class PhotonLynxModule extends com.qualcomm.hardware.lynx.LynxModule
A customized LynxModule implementation for intercepting and routing LynxCommands through the PhotonCore parallel transmission pipeline to optimize FTC hardware loop times.
